title: 补齐产品操作摩擦审计
goal: 基于当前真实页面截图、E2E 覆盖、源码位置和外部优秀实践，审计 SkillHub 从导入到测评、版本评审、历史和治理的操作摩擦，并把下一轮优化收敛成可执行优先级。
scope: 读取最新 Vercel Web Interface Guidelines、NN/g 启发式、Linear command menu、GitHub PR review 和 Microsoft menu guidelines
查看当前视觉回归截图：empty、overview、manual eval、variants、promotion、run comparison、audit explorer、mobile
检查关键 CSS 和组件源码，给摩擦项绑定文件/行号证据
更新 docs/product-ux-review.md 的剩余摩擦和下一轮优化队列
out_of_scope: 直接改 UI 布局或 CSS
verification: Inspected apps/web/app/globals.css, SkillLaunchpad, WorkbenchInspector, SkillAuditExplorer, DecisionWorkbench
cd apps/web && npm run test:unit -> 1 file passed, 3 tests passed
cd apps/web && npm run typecheck -> passed
cd apps/web && npm run build -> passed
cd apps/web && npm audit --omit=dev -> found 0 vulnerabilities
cd apps/api && uv run pytest -> 90 passed
cd apps/web && UV_CACHE_DIR=/Users/xx/Documents/code/skills-manager/.uv-cache npm run e2e -> 50 passed
